module.name: no-math-random
module.description: Disallow Math.random(); inject randomness explicitly or use a dedicated random source.

scenarios.name: should allow injected random generators
scenarios.given: code that calls a project-provided random generator such as rng.nextFloat()

scenarios.name: should allow computed Math random access
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because only direct Math.random member access is targeted

scenarios.name: should disallow direct Math.random calls
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression
